programs: none disclosed (Therapure Biomanufacturing biologics CDMO; Therapure Innovations protein therapeutics for liver cancer/anemia/hepatitis C; Evolve Biologics plasma-derived therapeutics)
evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Therapure Biomanufacturing is a global contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO)—your source for integrated biologics CDMO services." From the Innovations section: "developing innovative protein therapeutics in liver cancer, anemia and hepatitis C." From the Biologics section: "deliver critical plasma-derived therapeutics." No antibody-based ngAbs program disclosed; the live site has additionally decayed into off-topic SEO blog content (skincare, Minecraft), reducing confidence.
disqualifier_reason: no antibody program (protein-therapeutics and plasma-derived biologics CDMO; no disclosed antibody/ngAbs modality)

programs: none disclosed (solid, sterile, semi-solid and liquid dose-form drug manufacturing; prefilled syringes, nasal spray, liquid products)

Nos expertises couvrent les formes solides, stériles, semi-solides et liquides." Dose-form/fill-finish CDMO with no biologics or antibody capability disclosed.

programs: none disclosed (industrial automation / integration solutions for biopharma manufacturing equipment)
evidence_quote: From the Antibodies & Recombinant Proteins page: "What does the AES solution mean for the production of Antibodies and Recombinant Proteins? Fewer Deviations, Faster run rates, High Data Integrity... Fully integrated manufacturing facilities where all equipment is connected." AES sells automation/integration solutions for biopharma equipment; it does not develop, manufacture, or provide antibody bioprocessing contract services.
disqualifier_reason: no antibody program (engineering/automation equipment & integration vendor, not an antibody developer or bioprocessing service provider)

programs: none disclosed (Chroniject sustained-release microsphere / long-acting injectable CDMO for small molecules, peptides, proteins)

programs: none disclosed (sterile injectable fill-finish for liquid/lyophilized vials, syringes, cartridges)
evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Grand River Aseptic Manufacturing (GRAM) is a premier contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO) specializing in sterile injectable fill-and-finish services for liquid and lyophilized vials, syringes, and cartridges." Pure fill-finish; no upstream/downstream antibody bioprocessing of the drug substance.
disqualifier_reason: no antibody bioprocessing (pure sterile fill-finish CDMO; fills the finished drug product regardless of modality, does not develop or bioprocess antibodies)

programs: CDMO mammalian (CHO) expression platform supporting monoclonal antibodies and Fc-fusion proteins, with biosimilarity/comparability frameworks; also bioreagents, Bio-APIs (enzymes), peptides, biosimilars
evidence_quote: From the CDMO Manufacturing Platforms (Mammalian Expression / CHO) page: "Our mammalian platform supports complex, glycosylated biologics, including monoclonal antibodies and Fc-fusion proteins. CHO cell line development and optimization; Advanced bioprocessing for glycosylation control; ... Biosimilarity and comparability frameworks." This is a stated antibody-based bioprocessing service capability (Fc-fusion + mAb), though disclosed shipped products are non-antibody enzymes/peptides.
na_site_reasoning: Provis is a WHO-GMP, animal-origin-free manufacturer presenting as serving North America/Europe/Asia but with no physical North American (US/Canada/Mexico) wet-lab, process-dev, or GMP manufacturing site disclosed on the site; presence reads as an exporter serving NA rather than operating there.

programs: none disclosed (drug-device combination CDMO: injectable, inhalation/pulmonary, nasal, dermal/transdermal; device manufacture + sterile fill-finish + assembly)
evidence_quote: From the homepage: "As a purpose-fueled drug delivery CDMO, we leverage our specialist injectable, inhalation and dermal expertise." From the Sterile injectables page: "Seamless integration of device manufacture, sterile fill finish and final assembly in one location." Drug-delivery/device CDMO with fill-finish; no antibody bioprocessing of drug substance.
disqualifier_reason: no antibody bioprocessing (drug-device delivery CDMO doing device manufacture and sterile fill-finish, not antibody development or upstream/downstream bioprocessing)
